title: Jurisdiction-First Answers
imgAlt: A clean UI card showing a jurisdiction selector and citations

content.summary: Verdictu starts every response by locking the jurisdiction. No more mixing Danish rules with German courts.
content.section1: Pick a country (and optionally region/court level) before you ask. The assistant then uses the correct legal framework and labels what is EU-wide vs national implementation.
quote: If you don’t anchor jurisdiction first, legal AI becomes confident nonsense.
content.section2: Result: answers you can actually trust—because every claim points back to the right system and the right source.

title: Source-Backed Clarity
imgAlt: A document with highlighted citations next to a response

content.summary: Every important claim can be traced to a source. The user doesn’t have to “take AI’s word for it.”
content.section1: Verdictu prioritizes primary sources: official registers, ministries, agencies, and courts. When sources conflict or are uncertain, we say so and show where the truth lives.
quote: Citations aren’t decoration—they’re the trust mechanism.
content.section2: Result: less risk, faster verification, and a clear path from question → authority → answer.

title: Compare Mode for Documents
imgAlt: Two documents side-by-side with differences highlighted

content.summary: Drop in two documents and ask what changed, what’s risky, and what’s missing.
content.section1: Verdictu summarizes differences by topic (payment, termination, liability, privacy). It separates quoted text from analysis so you can review without confusion.
quote: Tell us your goal: reduce risk, speed review, or ensure compliance.
content.section2: Result: faster reviews, fewer missed clause changes, and clearer next actions.

title: Draft Mode Templates
imgAlt: A structured editor with templates and sections

content.summary: Start from a template and get a clean first draft with the right tone and structure.
content.section1: Use predefined templates (letters, clauses, short memos). Ask for variants (formal/friendly), and export when ready.
quote: AI drafts best when you give constraints: jurisdiction, audience, goal.
content.section2: Result: polished drafts faster—with your facts and your control.
